entities.description: The broader region where Nkayi District is located

entities.description: Benefits provided by the ecosystem to humans

entities.name: WATER BODIES
entities.description: Land cover consisting of water

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The practice of farming, driving woodland clearing

entities.name: SOIL INFERTILITY

entities.description: A specific type of fragile woodland ecosystem in Zimbabwe

entities.name: CROP RESIDUES

entities.name: HUMAN SETTLEMENTS
